entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungus known for producing aflatoxins and responding to oxidative stress

entities.name: AF13
entities.description: A high aflatoxin-producing field isolate of Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: NRRL3357
entities.description: A moderate aflatoxin-producing field isolate of Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The capability of Aspergillus flavus to produce aflatoxin

entities.name: OXIDATIVE STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by the accumulation of reactive oxygen species

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental stress that derives reactive oxygen species

entities.name: REACTIVE OXYGEN SPECIES
entities.description: Molecules that stimulate aflatoxin production and regulate responses in A. flavus

entities.name: GLOBAL UNTARGETED METABOLOMICS
entities.description: An analytical approach used to describe compounds and pathways in response to stress

entities.name: H2O2
entities.description: Hydrogen peroxide used to supplement medium to induce oxidative stress

entities.name: CARBOHYDRATE METABOLISM
entities.description: Metabolic pathways involving carbohydrates that may be influenced by repression and starvation

entities.name: GLUTATHIONE METABOLISM
entities.description: An antioxidant metabolic pathway stimulated in NRRL3357

entities.name: POLYAMINE METABOLISM
entities.description: An antioxidant metabolic pathway stimulated in NRRL3357

entities.name: TCA CYCLE
entities.description: A central metabolic pathway stimulated in NRRL3357

entities.name: LIPID METABOLISM
entities.description: A metabolic pathway stimulated in NRRL3357

entities.name: CONIDIAL OXIDATIVE STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of conidia to withstand oxidative stress

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of the organism to neutralize oxidative stress

entities.name: HOST PLANTS
entities.description: Plants that interact with Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: HOST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of host plants to resist fungal infection

entities.name: BIOMARKER SELECTION
entities.description: A method to enhance host resistance by identifying specific markers

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: A technique used to enhance host resistance

entities.name: CARBOHYDRATE REPRESSION
entities.description: A regulatory mechanism influencing metabolite accumulation

entities.name: STARVATION
entities.description: A state of nutrient deficiency influencing metabolite accumulation
